Hero.badge: Built on Solana · settled in USDC
Hero.title: Credit for AI agents.
Hero.subtitle: Your agent earns. The loan repays itself — paid first, forwarded second.

HowItWorks.title: Income that repays itself
HowItWorks.s1Body: Your agent gets paid in USDC for the work it does online.
HowItWorks.s2Body: A program-owned account it can't drain — payments arrive here.
HowItWorks.s3Body: The vault repays the loan, then forwards the rest to your agent.

HowItWorksPage.title: Income that repays itself.
HowItWorksPage.subtitle: AMALoan installs a first-claim on your agent's x402 income. Every payment repays the loan before anything else — then forwards the rest to you.
HowItWorksPage.claimBody: Your agent advertises an AMALoan vault as its x402 payTo. The vault is owned by the protocol, not your agent — so income can't be spent until the loan is repaid. No collateral, no custody of your wallet, no human in the loop.
HowItWorksPage.f1Body: You keep your keys. Only the income vault is program-controlled.
HowItWorksPage.f2Body: Repayment happens the instant income arrives — no action needed.
HowItWorksPage.f3Body: You keep every dollar above what's owed, forwarded the same block.
HowItWorksPage.ctaTitle: Give your agent a credit line.
HowItWorksPage.ctaBody: Borrow against income it hasn't earned yet.

Developers.title: A credit line in 5 lines
Developers.body: Give your agent working capital it repays from its own income.

LendersPage.title: Real yield from real agent revenue.
LendersPage.subtitle: Supply USDC and earn the spread on loans to income-generating AI agents. Yield comes from actual revenue — not token emissions.
LendersPage.poolConsDesc: Senior tranche · repaid first · protected by the first-loss buffer.
LendersPage.poolHighDesc: Junior · first-loss · higher mean return, can be impaired.
LendersPage.s1Body: Deposit into a pool that matches your risk appetite.
LendersPage.s2Body: Your capital is lent to vetted, income-earning agents.
LendersPage.s3Body: Interest accrues continuously, net of a transparent fee.
LendersPage.ctaBody: Real yield, fully on-chain, withdraw anytime liquidity allows.

DevelopersPage.title: A credit line for your agent, in 5 lines.
DevelopersPage.subtitle: Install the SDK, request a loan, and let your agent's income repay it automatically. Non-custodial by design.
DevelopersPage.s1Body: Add @amaloan/sdk and the sweep module to your agent's account.
DevelopersPage.s2Body: Call Float.borrow() the moment your agent needs working capital.
DevelopersPage.s3Body: x402 payments repay the loan first, then forward the rest to you.
DevelopersPage.f1Body: Underwriting from on-chain reputation + income — no forms.
DevelopersPage.f2Body: You keep your keys; only the income vault is program-owned.
DevelopersPage.f3Body: Every repayment grows a portable on-chain credit score.
DevelopersPage.ctaTitle: Give your agent a balance sheet.
DevelopersPage.ctaBody: Borrow against income it hasn't earned yet.

Lenders.title: Real yield, real revenue
Lenders.body: Earn from actual agent revenue — not token emissions.

SecurityPage.title: Built so we can't run away with your money.
SecurityPage.subtitle: AMALoan is non-custodial and verifiable. Your trust comes from code you can audit — not from promises.
SecurityPage.p1Body: Funds live in audited contracts. There is no admin function that can withdraw lender principal.
SecurityPage.p2Body: Every privileged change waits 48–72h behind a multisig, so you can exit before it takes effect.
SecurityPage.p3Body: Assets ≥ liabilities + buffer is a live on-chain invariant, checkable at every block.
SecurityPage.p4Body: Core contracts are audited by a Solana-specialist firm before any third-party capital.
SecurityPage.p5Body: Per-pool isolation and hard caps bound the blast radius of any single issue.
SecurityPage.p6Body: Emergencies can halt new borrows — never seize funds or freeze your withdrawals.
SecurityPage.verifyBody: Contracts are open-source and verified on-chain. Anyone can re-derive every number from public data — the founder is structurally unable to rug.
SecurityPage.ctaBody: Full threat model, audits, and bug-bounty scope.

TransparencyPage.title: Every dollar, on-chain.
TransparencyPage.subtitle: We report realized, net numbers — never projected APRs. Losses are published louder than gains. Verify any figure yourself.
TransparencyPage.porBody: Pooled assets fully back lender claims plus the first-loss buffer. Coverage is recomputed every block.
TransparencyPage.feedNote: Every loan, sweep, repayment, and default is an on-chain event you can open in the explorer.
TransparencyPage.ctaBody: Real-time stats, loan book, and reserve coverage.

EconomicsPage.title: Yield from real work, not emissions.
EconomicsPage.subtitle: AMALoan earns a small spread on loans that real agent revenue repays. No inflationary token props up the returns.
EconomicsPage.s1Body: Borrowers pay a risk-priced rate on short, small loans.
EconomicsPage.s2Body: Most interest flows to lenders; the protocol keeps a reserve factor.
EconomicsPage.s3Body: A first-loss buffer, funded by fees, protects lender principal.
EconomicsPage.f1Body: A reserve factor of 10–20% on borrower interest funds the protocol and buffer.
EconomicsPage.f2Body: A small fee per loan, split between treasury and the first-loss tranche.
EconomicsPage.f3Body: Every dollar of yield traces to real, settled agent revenue.
EconomicsPage.ctaBody: Full rate curve, tranches, and reserve math.

DocsPage.d1Body: From zero to a first loan in five minutes.
DocsPage.d2Body: @amaloan/sdk — borrow, repay, and the sweep module.

DocsPage.d4Body: Route your agent's income through the AMALoan vault.
DocsPage.ctaBody: Open the quickstart and ship a credit line today.

AboutPage.title: We're building the balance sheet for AI agents.
AboutPage.subtitle: The agent economy is exploding — but autonomous agents can't borrow. We're fixing that.
AboutPage.missionBody: As AI agents start earning real money online, they hit the oldest problem in business: you have to spend before you earn. AMALoan gives them credit — secured by their own future income, repaid automatically, and fully on-chain. We believe the credit layer of the machine economy should be neutral, transparent, and owned by no single giant.
AboutPage.v1Body: Non-custodial and verifiable — we can't touch your funds.
AboutPage.v2Body: Yield from real revenue, numbers reported honestly.
AboutPage.v3Body: Built on open standards: x402, SATI, Solana.
AboutPage.ctaBody: We're hiring across protocol, frontend, and growth.
